name: Mitsurugi Great Purification
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>巳剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ミツルギ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>大祓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>オオハラエ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent activates a card or effect: Tribute 1 Level 5 or higher Reptile monster; negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that card. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Reptile monster in your GY; Special Summon it, and if you do, Tribute 1 other monster you control. You can only use 1 "Mitsurugi Great Purification" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect: Tribute 1 Level 5 or higher Reptile monster; negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that card. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Reptile monster in your GY; Special Summon it, and if you do, Tribute 1 other monster you control. You can only use 1 "Mitsurugi Great Purification" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
